title: External Research Plan: PM proof posture
research_objective: Validate the external proof posture for ProductOS claims about governed PM operating leverage.

prioritized_questions.question: Do PM buyers expect explicit governance and review controls before trusting AI-assisted operating workflows?
prioritized_questions.why_it_matters: The release claim should not imply a trust posture buyers do not actually accept.
search_queries: product management ai governance buyer expectations
pm workflow ai trust review controls
source_requirements: Fresh operator or market validation evidence
Named source with clear publication ownership

known_gaps: Need external validation that governance-first messaging matches buyer expectations.
claims_needing_validation: Governed PM workflow messaging is safe to use in the next bounded release.
coverage_summary.recommended_next_step: Discover candidate sources, review their freshness, and persist a governed research review.

suggested_manifest_sources.title: Governance-first PM AI evidence source
suggested_manifest_sources.rationale: Use a recent source that explicitly addresses AI governance expectations for product or operations buyers.
